tooltip.redstonelapismod.redstone_goggle: Nearby ores shimmer with redstone motes
tooltip.redstonelapismod.rocket_boots.ch: Hold jump to charge a redstone blast, release to fire
tooltip.redstonelapismod.rocket_boots.mo: Launches you skyward — or forward while gliding
tooltip.redstonelapismod.headgear.insert: Right-click a battery onto this item to install it
tooltip.redstonelapismod.battery.desc: Stores redstone charge to power gadgets
message.redstonelapismod.battery.no_reds: No redstone dust to charge with
